docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALSH, KYLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 410 EDDY STREET, UNIT #409 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79116218)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79173313)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WALSH, KYLE
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WALSH, KYLE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, KYLE
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 79116218) AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, KYLE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, KYLE
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 79116218) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA
REMARK: AT APPROXIMATELY 3:20 PM TODAY - EDC COURIER DROPPED OFF ANSWER AND FEE WAIVER DOCUMENTS FOR DEFENDANT KYLE WALSH.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE ($6.80/DAY) (TRANSACTION ID # 79173313) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, KYLE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, KYLE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, KYLE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 79003995) AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, KYLE
